data.title: Cardano's Price Shows Potential for Bullish Divergence
data.description: Cardano's price is exhibiting signs of a bullish divergence, reminiscent of a pattern that led to a 32% rally last year. According to NS3.AI, this development is bolstered by increased accumulation from whale wallets. While long-term holders remain inactive, which reduces downside risk, there is a rise in short-term activity that could lead to supply concerns. For a sustained uptrend to be confirmed, Cardano must surpass critical resistance levels at $0.41 and $0.43. Conversely, a decline below $0.35 would negate the bullish setup.

data.title: Federal Reserve Announces $8.3B Treasury Bill Purchase as Bitcoin Faces Market Volatility
data.description: The U.S. Federal Reserve has scheduled an $8.3 billion Treasury bill purchase for January 20, 2026, as part of a broader $55 billion liquidity injection into financial markets, according to data cited by NS3.AI.The announcement comes amid heightened volatility in the Bitcoin market, which has been pressured in recent sessions by geopolitical tensions and renewed tariff-related uncertainty.Liquidity injection amid macro instabilityThe Treasury bill purchase forms part of the Federal Reserve’s ongoing balance sheet operations, aimed at maintaining sufficient liquidity within the financial system. While the move does not represent a formal shift in monetary policy, it adds short-term liquidity at a time when global markets remain sensitive to political and macroeconomic developments.Bitcoin has experienced sharp price fluctuations in recent days, reacting to escalating trade tensions and broader risk-off sentiment across global markets.Bitcoin outlook remains cautiously optimisticDespite near-term pressure, some market participants maintain a cautiously optimistic outlook for Bitcoin, noting that liquidity injections have historically provided medium-term support for risk assets.However, analysts also warn that macroeconomic uncertainty remains elevated. Investor flows have recently favored traditional safe-haven assets such as gold and silver, both of which have reached record highs, potentially limiting Bitcoin’s upside in the short term.Short-term consolidation possibleWith tariff risks, geopolitical uncertainty, and shifting capital flows still dominating sentiment, Bitcoin may continue to consolidate or face further corrective moves before establishing a clearer trend.Market participants are closely monitoring whether sustained liquidity support and improving risk appetite can eventually translate into renewed momentum for digital assets.

data.title: Trader Utilizes High Leverage for Bitcoin Short Position
data.description:
On January 20, a trader entered a short position on Bitcoin using 40x leverage, according to BlockBeats. The position involved 130 BTC at an average entry price of $91,564.9, currently showing a slight profit.

The trader's address is known for employing high leverage strategies, demonstrating a keen ability to navigate short-term market fluctuations. The active management of funds highlights a sensitivity to market dynamics.

data.title: A new address withdrew 6,000 ETH from Bybit and deposited it into Aave, worth $19.03 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, in the past 3 hours, a newly created wallet 0x919c (0x919c...9B03) withdrew 6,000 ETH from Bybit, worth $19.03 million, and then deposited it into Aave.

data.title: MegaETH will launch its public mainnet on January 22 and begin global stress testing.
data.description: On January 20th, the Ethereum Layer 2 project MegaETH announced that its public mainnet will officially launch on January 22nd. The official statement indicated that several USDM-based DeFi applications will be launched simultaneously on the first day of the mainnet launch, along with a global stress test. The announcement revealed that the stress test plans to process approximately 11 billion transactions over 7 days, with a target throughput of 15,000–35,000 TPS during the test.

data.title: Ethereum Faces Surge in Address Poisoning Attacks Amid Lower Gas Fees
data.description: Ethereum has recently experienced a significant increase in transaction and address activity, potentially due to large-scale address poisoning attacks exploiting low gas fees. According to PANews, security researcher Andrey Sergeenkov highlighted that these attacks involve creating similar-looking addresses to conduct 'dust attacks,' misleading users into transferring funds to incorrect addresses. Following the Fusaka upgrade, transaction fees have dropped by over 60%, significantly reducing the cost of such attacks. Research indicates that more than 116,000 individuals have been affected, with cumulative losses exceeding $740,000.

data.title: Ethereum Community Center Set to Open in Hong Kong
data.description: The Ethereum ecosystem expansion team has announced the opening of the next Ethereum Community Center in Hong Kong on January 20. According to BlockBeats, the official launch event is scheduled for January 24, focusing on offline interactions, co-creation, and event hosting. Many users view the Hong Kong Community Center as a crucial node for connecting the Ethereum ecosystem in East Asia.

data.title: UK Committee Warns of AI Risks in Financial Services
data.description: A UK parliamentary committee has raised concerns about the rapid adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) in financial services, which is outpacing regulators' ability to manage associated risks. According to NS3.AI, the Treasury Committee criticized UK regulators for depending excessively on outdated regulations and called for clearer guidance on AI usage by 2026. Experts have pointed out that AI's complex and opaque systems pose challenges to traditional regulatory frameworks, potentially leading to harm and hindering responsible AI innovation.

data.title: The new X algorithm has been officially open-sourced, and Musk says it will continue to be significantly improved.
data.description: On January 20th, the X platform engineering team announced that it had officially open-sourced the latest version of the X algorithm. The official description states that the algorithm uses the same Transformer architecture as xAI's Grok model. Elon Musk subsequently responded that the current algorithm is still "quite clunky" and requires continuous and significant improvements, but open-sourcing it means users can see the entire optimization process in real time and transparently, pointing out that other social media platforms have not taken similar steps. Previously, on January 11th, Musk stated that X would open-source the core algorithm code used to determine organic search content and ad recommendations within 7 days, planning to repeat this every four weeks, along with detailed developer notes. Earlier, the X platform algorithm's adjustments to recommendations for "cryptocurrency"-related content sparked widespread discussion in the crypto community.

data.title: South Korean Man Sentenced for Cryptocurrency Robbery
data.description: A South Korean man has been sentenced to six years in prison for robbery disguised as a cryptocurrency transaction. According to NS3.AI, the individual used social media to attract a crypto trader with a fraudulent offer to sell coins valued at 200 million won. During an in-person meeting, the man stole approximately $52,300 in cash and subsequently fled the scene.

data.title: UK Parliamentary Panel Flags AI Oversight Gaps Could Expose Financial System to Harm
data.description:
A parliamentary committee said regulators are struggling to keep pace as AI spreads across banks and insurers, urging clearer guidance.
source: https://decrypt.co/355102/uk-parliamentary-panel-flags-ai-oversight-gaps-could-expose-financial-system-to-harm

data.title: Musk Announces Open Source Algorithm for X Platform
data.description:
Elon Musk has announced on the X platform that despite existing issues with the recommendation algorithm, efforts are underway to improve it. According to PANews, the team has made the new algorithm open source, allowing the public to view and adjust the process in real-time. This algorithm is based on the same Transformer architecture as the Grok model from xAI.

Earlier this month, Musk stated that the new X platform algorithm would be open-sourced within seven days, with this process set to repeat every four weeks.

data.title: Crypto Market Sentiment Shifts to Fear as Index Declines
data.description: The Crypto Fear & Greed Index has experienced a significant drop from a recent high of 61 to 32 over the past week, reflecting a prevailing sense of fear in the market. According to NS3.AI, despite reaching a temporary peak, the index continues to reside in the 'Fear' zone, indicating cautious sentiment among investors. This index evaluates various factors, including volatility, market volume, social media sentiment, and Bitcoin dominance, to assess investor emotions.

data.title: CryptoD: The Bags model essentially transfers risk to the market; we are optimistic about AI projects that grow together with the community.
data.description: Trader CryptoD posted on the X platform that he recently suffered losses on the Bags project. Bags suffers from over-reliance on news and the unstable personalities of its creators. Many projects on the platform are from well-known Web2 teams that haven't secured funding, using Web3 narratives to absorb attention, resulting in limited growth potential. This model essentially transfers risk to the market rather than aligning with the community. CryptoD believes that AI projects on Pump are different; most start very small, with the project, narrative, and product building and growing alongside the community. Projects that grow together with the community are the model the cryptocurrency space truly needs.

data.title: Gate will launch Acurast (ACU) and introduce HODLer Airdrop, sharing 833,334 FUN.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate will launch Acurast (ACU) spot trading on January 20th at 20:00 (UTC+8), and will list Acurast (ACU) on the FlashExchange platform at 21:00 (UTC+8). The 332nd Acurast (ACU) HODLer Airdrop event is now underway and will end on January 20th, 2026 at 19:00 (UTC+8). Users holding 1 GT can participate in the airdrop for free, sharing 250,000 ACU. HODLer Airdrop VIP user benefits have been fully upgraded, with no upper limit on participation.

2. Researcher: Recent surge in Ethereum activity may be related to address poisoning attacks.

4. makinafi suffered an attack, losing approximately 1299 ETH, worth $4.13 million.

9. A new account... 10. A $10 million bet is placed on Rick Rieder becoming the next Federal Reserve Chairman; 11. Trove will switch development from Hyperliquid to Solana, and Trove's stock price drops 97% at the open; 12. A cybersecurity engineer is accused of stealing funds from a gambling website, and police in two locations seize 183 bitcoins.

data.title: Gold hits new all-time high of $4,735 as Bitcoin crashes below $92,000
data.description:
Gold just smashed to a new record high above $4,730, up +8. 9% YTD, and now up +80% over the past year. Bitcoin broke below $92,000, losing steam with only a +4. 90% gain YTD, despite early January strength.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/gold-hits-new-all-time-high-of-4735-as-bitcoin-crashes-below-92000/
